text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No way... We still can't go runningyet? It's just been workouts dayafter day... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? What's with all<n>the long
faces?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The nonstop raining over the past few<n>days has
finally come to a stop. But<n>the deluge was so
heavy that the<n>drainage systems can't keep up.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While the academy assigned all<n>available staff to
help restore the<n>track back to its former state,
whether<n>it's ready for use or not remains
debatable.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Over here, everyone! Gather around!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek comes into view leading<n>a group of
children on a tour of the<n>academy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the little ones have come out to<n>play! We
gotta look lively, folks!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Hey, why isn't anybody running<n>outside?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I'm so sorry, my dears. You<n>see, we can't
run out there with all<n>the mud.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Aww man! But I wanna see! Please<n>run!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's that? You wanna see us in<n>action? Just
leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Feast your eyes, boys and<n>girls, on the
swiftest runner 'round<n>these parts!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Inari One starts to run on the dirt track<n>swamped
with mud, but it isn't long<n>before...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Skid!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yowch! I got too excited and totally<n>face-planted!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Inari, sweetheart, are you okay?!<n>Don't push
yourself so hard!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's take it easy today... yeah?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What?! And after I just ate dirt like<n>that? Sorry, but
no can do!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know today's just a normal day of<n>training,
meaning it's necessary to<n>pace myself.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But look at the hope in the little ones'<n>eyes!
You're really gonna ask me to<n>spoil my
reputation?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Inari, dear...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... Besides, we're all dying to<n>go running.
Right, girls?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We're gonna let loose and<n>sprint at full
speed!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, and there they go... It looks<n>like there's
no stopping them now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, can I ask you to look<n>after the
Umamusume? I'm worried I<n>can't watch over
everyone by<n>myself... It'd be great if you could
give them some guidance.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I agree. If they run too fast, someone<n>might get
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa, you two can't be<n>serious! And I
already got everyone<n>so fired up!
choice_data_list: We'll keep the mood high by cheering.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okaay, I can get behind that! I want<n>y'all to cheer
until your voices go<n>hoarse!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, everyone, let's make some<n>noise! Hoot
and holler those lousy<n>rain clouds away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The children joyfully whoop and<n>cheer as the
boisterous Umamusume<n>run about.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, are you sure? What if they trip<n>and fall?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're saying we can race despite<n>the weather?
You sure you don't<n>want us to play it just a little
safe?
choice_data_list: It's fine, run all you want!
It's fine, run all you want!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you say... All right, I'm<n>gonna show you
the run of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're going stupid fast! Now<n>this is what
I'm talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As it's easier to achieve high speeds<n>on the soft,
dirt track, their breakneck<n>racing is met with great
enthusiasm<n>from the children!
